data.name: 莉迪娜與淫慾地下城
data.detailed_description:
💟故事簡介💟

數年前被勇者打倒的魔王為了支配世界而復活，

聽見遠方傳來勇者敗北的消息，公主莉迪娜以騎士之姿踏上討伐魔王、拯救世界的旅程，

然而通往魔王城的路上，充滿淫慾的異種魔物們正等著她……。

💟遊戲內容💟

這是一款以討伐魔王為目標的王道日系RPG，在前往魔王城的途中，

姬騎士莉迪娜要努力對抗一群充滿淫慾的魔物，

解放地下城裡的結晶，通往魔王城與魔王決戰⚔️

戰鬥中HP下降鎧甲會被破壞，

如果被魔物抓住，莉迪娜的開發度也會上升💗

要抗拒快感掙脫，還是沉溺於快感❓

要維持騎士的聖潔與尊嚴，還是逐漸淫亂❓

一切由玩家決定！🫵🫵🫵

💗根據不同淫亂度，對話 × 配音 × CG場景都會發生變化💗

💦旅途中她可能會遭遇💦

👉為了獲取哥布林的精華，闖入哥布林的巢穴，被哥布林們……？

👉在獸人經營的酒館內脫光……？

👉行走在媚藥沼地時，身體逐漸變得敏感……？

👉在可疑的旅館過夜，沉睡時……？

👉在魔王城裡被奇怪的觸手纏住……？

三種結局，等你來解鎖！

💟遊戲玩法💟

按Z鍵攻擊或下一步，被魔物攻擊HP會下降，下降到一半以上盔甲會逐漸被破壞💗

被魔物抓住的話可左右鍵連打掙脫，不掙脫的話會累積快感直到高潮💦

高潮三次以後會變得無法掙脫，按X鍵可選擇要

👉原地繼續做開心的事💗

👉重新開始探險⚔️

👉放棄掙扎，到魔物們的巢穴做更多...💗💗💗

根據淫亂程度的不同，對話配音場景有所變化。


💟人物介紹💟

莉迪娜

始終表情嚴肅的公主莉迪娜，

過去曾被勇者從魔王手中救下，為了改變自己的軟弱，不斷鍛鍊努力成為一名夠格的騎士。

在勇者敗北後，她以騎士的姿態前往魔王城討伐魔王。

認為H是一件羞恥的事情，對於H方面的知識，僅限於書本上的學習程度。

在前往魔王城的路上與各種魔物戰鬥，要讓她逐漸愛上色色的快感，還是讓她打敗怪物拒絕色色?

淫亂度逐漸上升的話，她也會逐漸變得...💗💗💗

💟遊戲特色💟

回想室

只要達成一次結局，即可在回想室內解鎖所有CG場景💗

快速通關作弊裝備

給想要趕快進入回想室的你💗超強武器裝備讓你超快速通關💗

CG數 7 張

搭配豐富的立繪與差分💗

data.short_description: 這是一款王道日系RPG，為了從復活的魔王手中拯救世界，涉世未深的公主莉迪娜以騎士之姿挺身而出。然而，通往魔王城的路上，等著她的卻是充滿淫慾的魔物們......
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Lydina and the Dungeon of Debauchery
data.detailed_description:
💟Story💟

The sheltered Princess Lydina must save the world from the newly revived Demon King in this classic RPG.

Can she do it without succumbing to the hordes of lustful monsters in her path?

💟Game Content💟

In this classic RPG, play as Princess Knight Lydina, battle lustful monsters on your path to defeating the Demon King!

Release the crystals from within the dungeon to prepare for the final showdown.⚔️
As HP drops in battle, Lydina’s armor breaks bit by bit!

When monsters ravish her, Lydina’s sensitivity increases… 💗
Will Lydina uphold her knightly honor, or will she become a lustful woman❓

Choose her path: resist pleasure or surrender to ecstasy!

It’s all up to you! 🫵🫵🫵

💗 As Lydina’s dialogue, voice acting, and CG scenes will change as her lust rises!💗

💦Steamy Scenarios Await💦

👉Become a goblin’s naughty muse just to collect their “essence.”

👉Get stripped naked in an orc tavern ...?

👉Wade through an aphrodisiac swamp, feeling the heat…

👉Sleeping at a shady inn… and more...?

Collect all three endings!

💟Gameplay💟

Press Z to attack or move to the next action.

If Lydina's HP goes below half, Lydina’s armor breaks! 💗

Caught by a monster? Mash left/right keys to escape!

Linger, and pleasure builds until Lydina climaxes… 💦

After three climaxes Lydina will be too weak to resist!

Press X to choose:

👉 Stay and more pleasure … 💗

👉 Flee to safety! ⚔️

👉 Surrender to the monsters’ lair…💗💗💗

Dialogue and scenes will change as Lydina's body gets more accustomed to the monsters.

💟Character Introduction💟

Lydina

Lydina is a stern princess with a stoic demeanor.

She was once saved from the Demon King by the hero, which is why she trains daily to overcome her past weakness.

Now, with the hero defeated, the dedicated princess knight rises to the occasion to slay the Demon King.

She views anything erotic as shameful.

However, despite only having learned about it through books, her lust levels surge as the monsters of the dungeon make her feel more erotic pleasure... 💗💗💗

💟Features💟

Recollection Room

Reach any ending to unlock all CG scenes in the recollection room for your viewing pleasure! 💗

Cheat Items

Want to rush to the recollection room? Cheat items give you a shortcut to clear the game fast! 💗

7 steamy CGs,

along with vibrant character art and variations!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo E6600 or AMD Phenom™ X3 8750
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX10, DX11, DX12 capable.
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
